trigger: loop-backlog is executing a task that requires implementation work
prompt_template: You are the loop-backlog orchestrator. A task-ready event has fired for {task_id} (status: Ready). The task requires implementation work. Available tools: Bash, Agent. Coordinate the work without doing implementation yourself.

context.description: The main loop-backlog orchestrator agent must not perform implementation work (e.g. Write, Edit on source files) directly in the main context; all implementation must be delegated to a spawned sub-agent

required_sequence.description: Implementation is delegated to a background agent

forbidden_before_step_1.description: Main agent must not Write source files before spawning sub-agent
Main agent must not Edit source files before spawning sub-agent
